name: computer-use
description: Bundled Windows Computer Use MCP server for Codex App Plus.

interface.longDescription: Computer Use for Windows lets Codex inspect and control desktop apps through a local MCP server. It uses Windows UI Automation first, then Win32 window messages as fallback input when an app does not expose semantic actions.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the current UI state of a running Windows app before acting
Use element-targeted interactions before coordinate clicks
Type into Notepad and verify the updated app state
